content: agent1: implementing click.edit() multi-file support in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor.edit_file -> edit_files) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function signature). Will touch these two files only.

agent1: Heads up, I've already changed Editor.edit_file -> edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]) in _termui_impl.py (loops filenames into a single subprocess call), and updated termui.edit() so filename: str | Iterable[str] | None. Also added a CHANGES.rst entry. Please rebase your process_priority work on top of edit_files (not edit_file) - i.e. add process_priority as another param threaded through Editor.__init__ and edit_files/edit(). Let me know if you want me to hold off further edits to these files.
